title: Productivity statistics: Sources and methods (10th edition) | Stats NZ

## Productivity statistics: Sources and methods (10th edition)
18 March 2014, 10:45am
Information on the data sources, definitions, and methodologies used to compile the annual labour, capital, and multifactor productivity (MFP) indexes that were published in the Productivity Statistics: 1978–2013 information release in March 2014.
